request.description: Use this request first. It returns access_token and the script stores it in the accessToken collection variable.
Admin only. Creates a new organization.
Returns a single organization by id. Admin can view any organization; other roles can view their own organization only.
Returns all organizations for admin; other roles get their own organization scope.
Admin only. Creates a team under an organization.
Returns a single team by id. Admin can view any team; other roles can view their own team only.
Returns all teams for an organization. Admin can view any organization; team_admin and team_lead can only view their own organization.
Admin and team_admin only. Admin can create all roles. Team admin can only create team_lead and team_member in their own team.
Returns the logged-in user's profile.
Returns a user by id with role-based scope control.
Team lead and team member only. Creates a client record under the logged-in user.
Any authenticated role can update a client, but only the creator is allowed to edit it.
Returns clients owned by the logged-in team_lead or team_member.
Returns clients for the current team. Allowed for team_admin and team_lead.
Returns role-scoped onboarding summary. Allowed for all authenticated roles.
Returns a client by id with role-based access control.
Creates client_details and initializes filing. Stores data.client_id into collection variable clientId.
Saves document uploads into documents table for the active filing.
Accepted as draft payload; generation engine integration is pending.
Saves bank highlights into bank_accounts table.
Saves expense rows into expenses table.
Saves loan rows into loans table.
Saves monthly loan summary rows into loan_summary table.
Returns section-wise completion and filing snapshot for current onboarding.
Final submit after required sections are complete. Marks filing status as onboarding_completed.
Admin dashboard overview with optional filters.
Admin dashboard team overview.
Team admin dashboard overview.
Team admin dashboard member detail.
Team lead dashboard overview.
Team lead dashboard member detail.
Team member dashboard overview.
